case_title: JUAN MARTIN RAMIREZ VS. HENRY ALBERTO RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, JUAN MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, HENRY ALBERTO AKA HENRY REMEZ AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HENRY R DRYWALL $4,126.99 PRINCIPAL, $27.14 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,334.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
